title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi co-founders Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan rebuilt the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy carriers, securing a $108M Series A. The founders attribute their success to pursuing the most ambitious version of their idea, maintaining a 2-year regulatory and execution moat that competitors cannot easily replicate.
